author: bonk1t <39348559+bonk1t@users.noreply.github.com>
message: feat: Refactor persistence callbacks and file handling; update and validate related tests. Change persistence callbacks to operate on thread data as dictionaries (items, metadata). Update file handling logic in Agent and related components; adjust tests to match new persistence and file handling signatures. Add and validate integration test for file knowledge retrieval via FileSearchTool (file upload to new vector store and retrieval). File attachment via 'input_file' in conversation history is not yet implemented; the relevant test is present but skipped. Update migration guide and documentation to reflect new persistence callback signatures and file handling approach.

author: bonk1t <39348559+bonk1t@users.noreply.github.com>
message: feat: Add agent sharing prevention for beta.1 - Prevent agent instances from being shared between multiple agencies - Fixes callback and ThreadManager conflicts when reusing agent instances - Comprehensive test coverage with 5 test scenarios - Clear error messages guide users to create separate instances - Updated test duplication prevention rule in .cursor/rules/tests.mdc - All tests pass: 5/5 sharing prevention, 12/12 persistence, examples work

author: bonk1t <39348559+bonk1t@users.noreply.github.com>
message: feat: migrate from 'Shared State' to 'Agency Context' terminology - Replace shared-state.mdx with comprehensive agency-context.mdx documentation - Add new agency_context.py example demonstrating modern usage patterns - Update examples to use consolidated imports and function_tool patterns - Modernize best practices documentation with v1.0.0-beta.1 patterns - Add MasterContext and related exports to main package __init__.py - Mark legacy _shared_state as deprecated in API documentation - This migration maintains full backward compatibility while providing clear documentation and examples for the new Agency Context system.
